form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.49) when fifth over 380m at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Looks one of the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Marginally slow to begin; Hampered rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (22.30) at big odds over 380m at this track. Aided by a low draw and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 380m. Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 380m at this track behind Aussie Audi beaten 4 lengths (22.19). Speedy type and will give a great sight from an inside box.
